xwikidoc.name: TaskClassSheet
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity ouptput="false"}} #set ($discard = $xwiki.ssx.use('GuidedTour.Code.TaskClassSheet')) #set ($discard = $xwiki.jsx.use('GuidedTour.Code.TaskClassSheet')) #set ($isEdit = ($xcontext.action == 'edit')) #set ($steps = $doc.getObjects('XWiki.GuidedTour.StepClass')) #set ($task = $doc.getObject('XWiki.GuidedTour.TaskClass')) ##set ($tour = $doc.parent.getObject('XWiki.GuidedTour.TourClass')) #set ($serializedSteps = []) #foreach ($step in $steps) #set ($discard = $serializedSteps.add({ 'element': $step.getValue('element'), 'order': $step.getValue('order'), 'placement': $step.getValue('placement'), 'reflex': $step.getValue('reflex'), 'targetPage': $step.getValue('targetPage'), 'targetAction': $step.getValue('targetAction'), 'queryParameters': $step.getValue('queryParameters') })) #end {{/velocity}} {{velocity}} {{html wiki="true"}}
#set($xclass = $task.xWikiClass) #foreach($property in $xclass.properties) #set ($propertyId = "${xclass.name}_${step.number}_$property.name")
$!escapetool.xml($property.hint)
$doc.display($property.name, $task)
#end
## This should be the page title directly, not a property. ##makeTaskPropertyDisplay('title')
== Steps == #if ($isEdit) #end

Steps

    #foreach ($step in $steps)
  • #if ("$!step.getValue('content')" == '') Step # $escapetool.xml($services.rendering.escape($step.getValue('order'), 'xwiki/2.1')) #else $escapetool.xml($services.rendering.escape($step.getValue('content'), 'xwiki/2.1')) #end
    • #end

Properties

#foreach ($step in $steps) #set($xclass = $step.xWikiClass)
#foreach($property in $xclass.properties) #set ($propertyId = "${xclass.name}_${step.number}_$property.name")
$!escapetool.xml($services.rendering.escape($property.hint, 'xwiki/2.1'))
$doc.display($property.name, $step)
#end
#end ## Have a template prepared for any Steps that might get added. #set ($nb = $doc.createNewObject('XWiki.GuidedTour.StepClass')) #set ($step = $doc.getObject('XWiki.GuidedTour.StepClass', $nb)) #set ($xclass = $step.xWikiClass)
#foreach($property in $xclass.properties) #set ($propertyId = "${xclass.name}_template_$property.name")
$!escapetool.xml($services.rendering.escape($property.hint, 'xwiki/2.1'))
$doc.display($property.name, $step)
#end
{{/html}} {{/velocity}}
